name: DigitalBridge Group, Inc.
summary: PART I . In this Annual Report, unless specifically stated otherwise or the context indicates otherwise, the terms the "Company," "DBRG," "DigitalBridge," "we," "our" and "us" refer to DigitalBridge Group, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. References to the Operating Company and the OP refer to DigitalBridge Operating Company, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company and the operating company of DBRG, and its consolidated subsidiaries.
